inputs.label: Pipe Inner Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Internal diameter of the pipe conveying the fluid.

businessContext_i18n.en: Internal diameter of the pipe conveying the fluid.
businessContext_i18n.de: Innendurchmesser des Rohrs, das das Fluid fördert.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre intérieur du tuyau transportant le fluide.

inputs.label: Fluid Velocity
inputs.businessContext: Average velocity of the fluid flow in the pipe.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average velocity of the fluid flow in the pipe.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Boru içindeki akışkan akışının ortalama hızı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Mittlere Strömungsgeschwindigkeit des Fluids im Rohr.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse moyenne de l'écoulement du fluide dans la conduite.

inputs.label: Fluid Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of the fluid (e.g., water = 1000 kg/m³).

businessContext_i18n.en: Density of the fluid (e.g., water = 1000 kg/m³).
businessContext_i18n.de: Dichte des Fluids (z. B. Wasser = 1000 kg/m³).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse volumique du fluide (ex. eau = 1000 kg/m³).

inputs.label: Dynamic Viscosity
inputs.businessContext: Dynamic viscosity of the fluid (e.g., water at 20°C ≈ 0.001 Pa·s).

businessContext_i18n.en: Dynamic viscosity of the fluid (e.g., water at 20°C ≈ 0.001 Pa·s).
businessContext_i18n.de: Dynamische Viskosität des Fluids (z. B. Wasser bei 20°C ≈ 0,001 Pa·s).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Viscosité dynamique du fluide (ex. eau à 20°C ≈ 0,001 Pa·s).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
